name: E-z Mic Pnut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the chocolate, butter, and milk in a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl for 1 to 2 minutes ½ at MED-HIGH (70%) until the butter is melted.
2. Stir until smooth and all the chocolate is melted. Add vanilla extract and stir again.
3. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until the mixture is smooth, creamy, but not crumbly.
4. Fold in the dry roasted peanuts.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
6. Chill for 20 minutes to firm up.
7. Cut into squares.
